untranslatable_reason: Cannot precisely translate 'white candle opens at or above the middle of the black candle's body' without an indicator for the midpoint of a prior candle's body (prev_middle). The pattern requires calculating (prev_open + prev_close) / 2, which is not available as a pre-calculated indicator. Body direction can be detected (body < 0 for black, close > open for white), but the midpoint comparison cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture: (1) black candle on day 1 via body < 0, (2) white candle on day 2 via close > open, (3) rise-retrace via directional body comparison. However, the core condition—'white candle opens/closes at or above the midpoint of the prior black candle'—requires prior-bar body midpoint calculation not available in the allowed indicator set. Exit condition uses reversal (close < open) as reasonable substitute for AUTHOR_SILENT.
